ItacPersonItem.Notes: Professor of civil institutions in the Paduan Studium. In charge of censorship over publications by the Venetian state. He was among the founders of the Ricovrati Academy, where he delivered a number of speeches on `fideicommissi`, `l`eccellenza dell`unione delle due vite attiva e contemplativa`, and in 1607 he praised the `villa`, taking the cue from the cave in the Ricovrati emblem. He joined the Ricovrati in 1599.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
